description: Style NoteUnderstated colouring on the base with shiny stones makes these sandals classy and elegant. They can be worn with ethnic wear. This pair of catwalk sandals can be worn to work with a pair of jeans and a nice kurta and some ethnic accessories.Heel: 2"Product DetailsBlunt toed sandals with thong style straps and an ankle loopSquare design detail with crystal and bead embellishmentsHas a mini wedge heel with mat weave styling on the sidesBrown and beige footbed with a heel patchTPR outsole with a plastic heel capMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
